en: Hey, you're the freaks. You know, dude, it is a little weird
ko: 이봐, 너희가 괴짜들이구나. 좀 이상하긴 해.

en: that you're talking to my doll. Thank you.
Um, I don't think I need a drag queen
ko: 음, 난 드래그 퀸이 정상 행동을 정의할 필요는 없다고 생각해.
하지만 이건 말할 수 있어, 모습이 완벽해.

en: But I will say this, the look is flawless.
Ooh, workin' the attitude. Okay, you're good.
ko: 연습을 많이 했어. 헤이, 헤이, 헤이.

en: I've had a lot of practice. Hey, hey, hey.
ko: 너 그렇게 대단하지 않아, 자매님. 알겠어?

en: You're not that great, Mr. Sister. All right?
ko: 난 너보다 셔를 더 잘해. 그렇게 생각해? 흠.

en: I do better Cher than you. You think so? Hmm.
Actually, it's, you think so? Ho!
